hypotheses.null_hypothesis: After costs and time-safe validation, the signal has zero or negative expected value versus the Kalshi executable break-even.
hypotheses.promotion_rule: Requires positive OOS edge after all-in costs, FDR-adjusted q-value below threshold, adequate sample size, and no failed safety gates.
hypotheses.retirement_rule: Retire after repeated OOS failure, vanished capacity, or decay below cost-aware threshold.
hypotheses.signal_definition: Near-settlement markets underreact to fresh external data before close.
hypotheses.training_window_policy: Use only observations timestamped before the validation decision point.
hypotheses.validation_window_policy: Use walk-forward or purged out-of-sample windows with no label overlap.

gates.name: no_execution_boundary
gates.reason: Hypothesis registry is research-only and contains no account/order fields.

hypotheses.null_hypothesis: After costs and time-safe validation, the signal has zero or negative expected value versus the Kalshi executable break-even.
hypotheses.promotion_rule: Requires positive OOS edge after all-in costs, FDR-adjusted q-value below threshold, adequate sample size, and no failed safety gates.
hypotheses.retirement_rule: Retire after repeated OOS failure, vanished capacity, or decay below cost-aware threshold.
hypotheses.signal_definition: Crowd-implied probabilities in wide-spread markets are miscalibrated relative to an external probability reference after fees.
hypotheses.training_window_policy: Use only observations timestamped before the validation decision point.
hypotheses.validation_window_policy: Use walk-forward or purged out-of-sample windows with no label overlap.

hypotheses.cost_model: All-in executable Kalshi break-even from the contract EV ledger, including known fees/slippage where available.

next_action.name: kalshi_labeled_oos_backtest_harness
next_action.stop_condition: Stop before sizing, execution, account/order paths, discretionary selection, or promoting a hypothesis without machine-readable falsification evidence.
next_action.why: The registry can now generate hypotheses, but none can promote without labeled outcomes, time-safe splits, costs, and FDR correction.

north_star: Extract and exploit mispricings in Kalshi event contracts before the crowd corrects them.

policy.ev_boundary: This registry does not compute usable EV; the contract EV ledger remains the only margin surface.
policy.false_discovery_control: No hypothesis can be promoted without OOS, cost-aware, FDR-controlled evidence.
policy.no_discretion: Hypotheses are generated from deterministic artifact rules; human selection cannot promote a hypothesis.
policy.signal_breadth: The registry tracks feature families across routes/classes so many weak hypotheses can be tested without hand-picking.
